uploaderPublicationDecision.reason: Uploader publication is owner-approved, hosted Release Check evidence is recorded, npm registry readback returns @agentique.io/uploader@0.2.2, and clean install smoke from the npm registry package passes. The package remains review-only and does not publish, approve, certify, host, or moderate resources.

parserVariantPublicationDecision.reason: Parser/variant package changes are published in the coordinated package releases. Hosted Release Check passed on main, registry publication completed, registry readback confirms all companion packages at 0.2.2, registry install smoke passed, and the public rollback/unpublish procedure is documented.

canonicalTicketPatchCandidate.reason: The canonical-host POST ticket flow and live envelope compatibility are carried forward in the coordinated 0.2.2 package set. The coordinated package release keeps companion package versions aligned; the behavior changes are concentrated in readback and uploader.

catalogDownloadPublicationDecision.reason: The coordinated 0.2.2 package publication completed after hosted Release Check and registry validation. Registry readback and clean install smoke pass for the full package set. The release remains scoped to package availability for catalog/download helper changes; direct broad byte-transfer availability, resource approval, safety certification, installation, extraction, and execution claims remain excluded.

agentNativePublicationDecision.reason: The coordinated 0.2.2 package publication completed after hosted Release Check and registry validation. Registry readback and clean install smoke pass for the full package set. The release remains scoped to package availability for agent-native schemas, validator findings, readback/badge helpers, uploader dry-runs, and starter metadata; resolver availability, direct install, credential handling, runtime compatibility, approval, publication of resources, and safety claims remain excluded.

portableProfilePublicationDecision.reason: Portable profile schema and validator source changes are published in the coordinated 0.2.2 package set. Registry readback and clean install smoke pass. Runtime and direct-install claims remain disabled.

graphBlockPublicationDecision.reason: Graph/block schema and validator source changes are published in the coordinated 0.2.2 package set. Registry readback and clean install smoke pass. Runtime and direct-install claims remain disabled.
